1084.issue: [S1084] "common.singletonHost" detected for non onlyWWW adapter. Is this really desired?

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/methods.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

8918.issue: [W8918] Workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml" references ioBroker action "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@main" with non-versioned ref "@main". Please use a versioned tag like "@v1".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.5.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/arteck/ioBroker.fullybrowser/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
